xdebugKey.label: Xdebug session key
xdebugKey.helpText: This name will be sent to the backend alongside with the Ajax calls, can be used for debugging. This string must be equal to that set in the browser plugin

playgroundBackend.label: Playground - backend
playgroundBackend.helpText: Open the backend playground view where code can be tested. DO NOT push that code to repo

playground.label: Playground - frontend
playground.helpText: Open the frontend playground view where code can be tested. DO NOT push that code to repo
